The view transitions to an extreme close-up of the red brick masonry, filling the frame with rows of protruding blocks. Finally, the scene cuts to a wide exterior shot of the house, showing the red brick volume elevated on concrete columns with a palm tree in front and a white car parked underneath.

The scene cuts to a wide exterior view of a modern house featuring a large, elevated red brick volume resting on concrete columns. A white car is parked in the shaded area underneath. A tall palm tree stands prominently in front of the brick facade, with greenery and a fence visible on the sides against a blue sky.

The scene cuts to a grey concrete building section featuring a balcony with a black metal railing. Green and brown hanging plants drape from the balcony edge above large glass windows reflecting the sky. A portion of the red brick wall is visible on the left side, with palm fronds appearing at the bottom.

Low-angle shot of massive red brick wall with perforated pattern. Tall palm tree stands in foreground, green fronds spreading across masonry. Above, concrete roofline with black railing visible against bright sky. White building section appears on far left.

The low-angle shot persists, displaying the expansive red brick wall with its perforated texture. A tall palm tree stands centrally in the foreground, its fronds overlapping the masonry. The concrete roofline with a black railing remains visible at the top against the sky.

The view shifts to a high-angle exterior perspective of the entire house. A red brick lower volume with perforated texture supports a grey concrete upper level featuring a cantilevered design and black metal railing. Lush green palm trees and vegetation surround the base, while neighboring white residential structures are visible in the distance against a pale sky.

A high-angle exterior shot captures the modern house, featuring a perforated red brick lower volume supporting a grey concrete upper level with a black railing. Tall palm trees surround the structure, while neighboring white buildings and green lawns are visible in the background under a pale sky.

A high-angle shot pulls back to reveal the surrounding neighborhood, showing the red brick volume and grey upper structure nestled among palm trees. To the right, a paved road curves past beige multi-story residential buildings, while a white modern house remains visible on the left side of the frame.

The camera pulls back further, revealing more of the surrounding neighborhood context. A paved road curves to the right, lined with beige multi-story residential buildings. A white modern house stands on the left. The red brick house with the grey upper level remains central, surrounded by tall palm trees.

The drone ascends and pulls back, revealing a wider context of the street. The red brick volume with a grey upper level stays central on columns. To the right, a road curves past beige apartment blocks. A white house stands on the left. Palm trees cast shadows on the ground, and green lawns surround the homes.

The camera ascends further, revealing a large beige gate structure with partial white text in the bottom right foreground. The wider shot exposes more of the neighborhood context, including distant buildings, open green fields on the left, and a curving road network, while the red brick house recedes into the center background.

The camera ascends and pulls back, causing the overall scene to darken significantly. The red brick house recedes further into the background. A beige gate structure with "Gokuldham" text remains in the bottom right foreground. The view expands to show more distant neighborhood buildings and roads under the dimming light.

The aerial view fades rapidly into total darkness, removing all visibility of the houses, streets, and gate structure. Finally, a pale green square logo containing the bold letters "DWF" and the smaller text "DESIGN WORK GROUP" appears centered against the solid black background.

A static title card remains on a solid black background. A pale green square logo featuring the bold, blocky letters 'DWF' sits centrally. Below it, the text 'DESIGN WORK GROUP' appears in small, thin capital letters. The scene remains completely still with no camera movement or lighting changes throughout the duration.

The static title card continues on a solid black background. A pale green square logo featuring the bold letters 'DWF' stays centered, with 'DESIGN WORK GROUP' text below in small capitals. The scene remains completely still with no camera movement or lighting changes.

The video cuts from the logo to a black screen displaying white text credits. The header 'DESIGN TEAM' sits centered above multiple rows of names in capital sans-serif font. Contributors listed include DINESH SUTHAR, JITENDRA SABALPARA, and BHARAT PATEL, separated by vertical bars. The text remains static on the dark background.

The screen displays a black background with white text credits titled "BUILDING TEAM" centered at the top. Below, rows of names in capital sans-serif font list contributors like Ramesh Singala, Himmat Patel, and Daju Bhai, separated by vertical bars. Additional names include Jivan Bhai, Mukesh Dholakiya, and Siemens Bellaccusion. The text remains static.

The video transitions to a new credit screen on a black background. Centered white text displays "STORY & DIRECTION" above the name "DINESH SUTHAR" in a thin, sans-serif font. This replaces the previous list of building team members, and the text remains static against the dark backdrop.

The video cuts to a black screen displaying white text credits. The header "SCRIPT & ASSISTANT DIRECTORS" appears centered above a row of names: "VISHAKHA JAIN | NIHAR THAKKAR | PRACHI MORAKHIYA | MAHIR MULTANI". The names are separated by vertical bars in a thin sans-serif font, remaining static against the dark background.

The video cuts to a black screen displaying white text credits titled "CAST" centered at the top. Below, three lines list actors and roles: "PURNA VIRANI AS MRS. BHALALA", "AJAY VARMA AS MR. BHALALA", and "LUCKY - DOG". The text remains static in a thin sans-serif font against the dark background.

A black screen displays white production credits centered on the frame. The header reads 'PRODUCTION & POST PRODUCTION' above a large 'V' logo. Below, 'DIRECTOR OF PHOTOGRAPHY' lists Smit Patel and Shiv Kachiwala, followed by 'ASSISTANT DOP' Mayur Patel. An email address appears at the bottom.

summary.text: [0-4] A static title card shows a pale green "DWF" logo above "DESIGN WORK GROUP" text on black. [4-8] Text changes to "BRICK CURTAIN HOUSE" in thin, light grey sans-serif font centered on black. [8-12] Cut to daylight exterior: white building with vertical slats (left), red brick upper wall (right). Lush green plants and palms fill the foreground. A person sits on central steps; another figure walks left past the white structure. [12-14] Interior hallway view: wooden staircase with black metal railing (left), wooden door with circular cutouts (center), sheer curtains (right). Scene cuts to a figure with long dark hair kneeling on a cushion before a wooden altar with framed pictures.

[14-18] An exterior view through floor-to-ceiling glass reveals a room with a white rug, red chair, and sofa, anchored by a red brick column on the left. On the deck, black chairs surround a table with blue and green tops, framed by palm fronds. [18-22] Inside, a person in a cream short-sleeved shirt sits on a beige leather sofa against a red brick wall. A black dog lies beside them as the person holds and reads a newspaper. [22-24] A low-angle shot captures a modern chandelier featuring a black geometric frame with spherical bulbs arranged in inner and outer rings. [24-28] A person in a cream shirt reaches for books on a shelf. The view widens to a study with dark walls, a large wooden bookshelf on the left, and a desk facing a window with grey blinds. To the right, a cabinet holds framed photos under a round clock.

[28-32] A black statue of a figure in a meditative pose with crossed legs, a topknot, and a necklace stands outdoors next to a light-colored textured wall, backed by green foliage and a black metal fence. [32-38] Text overlays appear sequentially on the wall to the right: "CLIMATE" fades in, followed by "CONTEXT" below it, and finally "CLIENT'S BRIEF" at the bottom in thin capital letters. [38-40] The scene cuts to a wide, dark landscape view at dusk with a low orange sun and silhouettes of dense trees and scattered buildings. [40-42] The landscape brightens significantly, revealing golden sunlight on the clouds and white buildings amidst the greenery.

[42-46] Bright sunlight bursts through billowing clouds, transitioning to a satellite view of Earth focusing on the Indian subcontinent. [46-50] The view rapidly zooms into a top-down aerial shot of a property featuring two rectangular buildings, a paved driveway, an oval green lawn, and a road with parked cars. [50-52] A silhouette depicts a family of two adults and two children holding hands with a dog on a grassy horizon. [52-56] A man in a light shirt and dark trousers stands on a wooden deck, leaning on a railing and facing lush palm trees and nearby buildings.

[56-60] A black dog with a red collar and blue harness lies on a beige sofa holding a yellow ball, while a blurred person in a cream shirt sits smiling against a red brick wall behind it. [60-64] The scene cuts to a wooden bookshelf laden with messy books, some with red spines, then shows a rear view of a person in a cream shirt with shoulder epaulets standing near a dark shelving unit. [64-68] A white wireframe sketch of a geometric building appears over a faded aerial background, transitioning into a rough pencil sketch of the structure isolated on white. [68-72] The image dissolves into a minimal site plan with a square plot at a road intersection marked by red dashed lines; the text "WEST" is visible along the plot's edge near a compass rose.

[72-76] A translucent light green strip labeled "WEST" appears along the top edge as red dashed road lines vanish. [76-78] A blue strip labeled "EAST" materializes along the bottom boundary. [78-82] A yellow strip labeled "SOUTH" emerges horizontally in the middle, separating the zones. [82-84] The solid colored strips fade significantly while a grey rectangular volumetric shape materializes centrally. [84-86] The grey volume transitions into three colored prisms: a dark blue block in the foreground, a yellow block in the middle section, and a green block forming the rear. The compass rose persists in the lower left corner throughout.

[86-90] A stepped massing model comprising dark blue, yellow, and green rectangular blocks sits on a white plot. Two realistic green trees materialize on the left near the western road boundary; a compass rose remains fixed bottom-left.
[90-92] A large, translucent pale green rectangular volume materializes floating above the existing stepped blocks.
[92-94] The floating volume transforms into a solid, opaque building mass featuring yellow, green, and teal sections. White text "KITCHEN" becomes visible on the side of the lower teal block.
[94-96] White text "BEDROOM" fades in directly above "KITCHEN" on the upper teal section.
[96-98] The view remains static, showing the colored lower blocks beneath the taller teal and yellow volume with persistent text labels.
[98-100] A translucent glass box structure with a dark grey roof materializes over the foreground dark blue block area, while upper blocks and trees remain static.

[100-102] A translucent glass box with a dark grey roof sits over a foreground blue block, below upper teal and yellow volumes labeled "BEDROOM" and "KITCHEN". A single green tree stands left, and a compass rose is fixed bottom left. [102-104] Text "LIVING ROOM" and "OPEN" appears on the glass box panels. [104-106] Black silhouettes materialize: one on the left sidewalk, two inside the glass structure, and one on the right sidewalk. [106-108] The transparent walls transition from grey to solid light blue, with "LIVING ROOM" visible on the left panel. [108-110] "POOJA SPACE" text appears on the upper yellow volume. [110-114] A white rectangular outline forms on the foreground ground surface near the parking area, while the architectural model and figures remain static.

[114-116] A static architectural visualization displays a multi-colored volumetric model with labels like "LIVING ROOM" and "POOJA SPACE." Black human silhouettes stand on sidewalks and inside the glass structure, while a white rectangular outline persists on the foreground ground near the parking area. Trees and a compass rose remain fixed.
[116-124] A blue rectangular volume labeled "HOME OFFICE" materializes on the upper left building section, sitting atop the structure adjacent to the orange "POOJA SPACE" volume. The rest of the model, including human silhouettes, trees, and other labels like "BEDROOM" and "KITCHEN," remains static throughout this period.
[124-126] The colored 3D model vanishes, replaced by a rough pencil sketch of the building structure. The drawing clarifies into distinct lines depicting a cantilevered volume, which is then filled with a solid light purple color. All previous zoning labels and colored blocks disappear from the visualization entirely.

[126-128] A rendering shows a cantilevered volume filling with a blue-to-purple gradient. The ground gains green grass and grey pavement; dark brown slats appear right.
[128-130] A red arrow appears upper right. Text "SURFACE EXPOSED TO" appears bottom center.
[130-132] The volume turns solid red. Text becomes "SURFACE EXPOSED TO THE WEST SIDE". A second red arrow appears top left.
[132-134] The volume shifts to orange-red. Arrows vanish. Text updates to "SURFACE EXPOSED TO THE WEST".
[134-136] Two red arrows point down at the roof. Text reads "HEAT GAIN THROUGHOUT THE".
[136-138] Elements vanish. A solid red block fills the left screen.
[138-140] A small B&W aerial photo appears right.

A large red gradient block remains on the left. On the right, four square reference images appear: an aerial view, a building facade, a geometric lattice, and a carved frieze. Sequentially, each transitions from black-and-white to color with a label. The top-left brick image is labeled "MATERIAL". The top-right facade is labeled "TEXTURE". The bottom-left lattice turns reddish-brown, labeled "JALI". The bottom-right carved stone turns yellowish-brown, labeled "ENGRAVING". The sequence ends with the four labeled, colored images static in a grid.

[154-160] A static layout features a large red gradient block on the left and a 2x2 grid of reference images on the right labeled 'MATERIAL', 'TEXTURE', 'JALI', and 'ENGRAVING', showing brickwork, a facade, a lattice pattern, and carved stone. [160-162] The red board cuts to a white screen where a pencil sketch of a cantilevered facade emerges, its grid rapidly iterating through textures like solid red, brown woven patterns, and brickwork. [162-164] The sketch stabilizes with a red brick texture while a side-elevation diagram appears on the right, its vertical profile line transforming into a wavy, undulating shape. [164-166] The brick facade and diagram vanish, replaced by a faint, low-contrast white sketch outlining a building section with a roof overhang and indistinct furniture shapes underneath. [166-168] The faint sketch transitions into a colored architectural section elevation against a blue sky gradient, revealing a cantilevered volume with a brown textured facade, two grey cars parked below, and black silhouettes of people on the roof and balconies.

[168-176] A static architectural section displays a cantilevered volume with a brown textured facade, columns, two grey cars underneath, and black silhouettes on the roof and balconies against a blue sky. [176-178] The central facade transforms into a semi-transparent blue-grey glass panel, while side brick textures remain. [178-180] Red graphics appear on the glass, evolving from vertical lines to a dot grid, and finally large circles enclosing the dots. [180-182] The scene remains static with the glass panel overlaid by red circles and dots, maintaining the surrounding structure and figures.

[182-192] A static architectural section depicts a cantilevered structure with brown brick sides and a central blue-grey panel featuring red graphical overlays of circles and dots. Two grey cars are parked below, while black silhouettes of figures occupy the balconies and roof against a blue gradient sky.
[192-194] The scene shifts to real footage, presenting a low-angle view of a red brick wall with a textured, perforated grid pattern. Dark palm fronds frame the top corners against a bright, overcast sky.

[194-198] A tight, angled close-up fills the frame with a red brick wall's textured masonry, emphasizing its protruding, perforated pattern. The camera pans slowly across the geometric arrangement, highlighting light and shadow on the repetitive blocks.
[198-204] Cutting to a low-angle exterior view, the tall red brick wall displays a perforated grid pattern. Green palm fronds hang in the upper left against a bright sky, while a grey concrete structural beam lines the bottom right edge.
[204-206] The view persists until a semi-transparent layer fades in over the masonry. This overlay introduces faint, grid-like lines resembling a window frame, creating a double-exposure effect where the brick texture merges with the superimposed geometry.

[206-214] A low-angle shot captures a red perforated brick wall extending upwards from a grey concrete beam, with a palm frond in the upper right; initially, a semi-transparent grid overlay creates a double-exposure effect over the masonry. [214-218] The scene cuts to a wide exterior view showing the large red brick volume cantilevering over a ground level supported by concrete columns. Tall palm trees frame the foreground on both sides, while a grey multi-story section stands to the left and a swing chair hangs beneath the brick overhang.

[218-226] A double-height living room features a perforated red brick wall, grey sofas, red bucket chairs, sheer curtains, a vertical painting, and a multi-bulb chandelier. The camera pulls back and tilts up, revealing a wooden wall with a TV and mezzanine railing. [226-230] A high-angle view shows the chandelier's branching structure over the sofas and a black arc floor lamp. [230-232] A close-up of the perforated brick wall and white column pulls back to show a wooden patio table and interior grey sofa with an ottoman, separated by a black door frame.

[232-238] The scene displays an interior living area where a grey sofa sits against a red brick wall. The backs of two red chairs with sculptural, perforated designs face the seating area. A black arc lamp extends over the sofa, and a wooden coffee table with a tray rests on a rug. Sheer white curtains drape along the right side.
[238-240] A wide shot reveals a double-height living room with a perforated red brick wall on the left, illuminated warmly. Grey sofas and red bucket chairs sit on a white rug near a wooden coffee table. Tall white curtains cover windows, and a complex chandelier hangs near a mezzanine railing.
[240-242] The view faces large glass doors opening onto a wooden deck where black chairs sit among lush green palm trees. Inside, a beige sofa rests against the right brick wall, facing a low wooden coffee table on a white rug.
[242-246] The shot cuts to an exterior view of the red brick wall featuring a perforated lattice pattern. Palm trees are visible on the left, and shadows highlight the texture of the masonry on the wooden deck floor.

[246-250] A static shot displays a red brick wall with a perforated lattice pattern, protruding blocks, and a wooden deck floor, transitioning to an extreme close-up of the masonry. [250-254] The view cuts to a wide exterior of a modern house featuring an elevated red brick volume on concrete columns with a white car parked underneath. A tall palm tree stands before the facade, while a grey concrete section above includes a balcony with black railings and hanging plants over glass windows. [254-260] A low-angle shot highlights the massive red brick wall and central palm tree, shifting to a high-angle perspective of the entire structure. This reveals a red brick lower volume supporting a cantilevered grey concrete upper level, surrounded by lush vegetation and neighboring white buildings.

[260-266] A high-angle shot captures a modern house with a perforated red brick lower volume and grey concrete upper level with a black railing, surrounded by palm trees. The camera pulls back to reveal a paved road curving past beige multi-story buildings on the right and a white house on the left. [266-272] As the drone ascends, a beige gate structure with "Gokuldham" text appears in the foreground while the scene darkens significantly. [272-274] The view fades to black, followed by a pale green square logo with "DWF" and "DESIGN WORK GROUP".

[274-278] A static title card displays a pale green square logo with bold 'DWF' letters and 'DESIGN WORK GROUP' text below on a black background. [278-280] 'DESIGN TEAM' lists DINESH SUTHAR, JITENDRA SABALPARA, BHARAT PATEL, MANISH VACHASIYA, NISHITA PATEL, SONAKSHI BERLIYA, VISHAKHA JAIN, BINDI GANDHI, NIHAR THAKKAR, RAVI PRAJAPATI. [280-282] 'BUILDING TEAM' shows RAMESH SINGALA, HIMMAT PATEL, DAJU BHAI, ZAHIR BHAI, JIVAN BHAI, JAYDEEP BHAI, UJJAWAL BHAI, CUDDU BHAI, PRAVIN TAAK, SARDAR BHAI. [282-284] Screen shows 'STORY & DIRECTION' credited to DINESH SUTHAR. [284-286] 'SCRIPT & ASSISTANT DIRECTORS' lists VISHAKHA JAIN, NIHAR THAKKAR, PRACHI MORAKHIYA, MAHIR MULTANI. [286-288] 'CAST' lists PURNA VIRANI AS MRS. BHALALA, AJAY VARMA AS MR. BHALALA, and LUCKY - DOG.

[8-12] Cut to daylight exterior: white building with vertical slats (left), red brick upper wall (right). Lush green plants and palms fill the foreground. A person sits on central steps; another figure walks left past the white structure. [12-14] Interior hallway view: wooden staircase with black metal railing (left), wooden door with circular cutouts (center), sheer curtains (right). Scene cuts to a figure with long dark hair kneeling on a cushion before a wooden altar with framed pictures. [14-18] An exterior view through floor-to-ceiling glass reveals a room with a white rug, red chair, and sofa, anchored by a red brick column on the left. On the deck, black chairs surround a table with blue and green tops, framed by palm fronds. [18-22] Inside, a person in a cream short-sleeved shirt sits on a beige leather sofa against a red brick wall. A black dog lies beside them as the person holds and reads a newspaper. [22-24] A low-angle shot captures a modern chandelier featuring a

[56-60] A black dog with a red collar and blue harness lies on a beige sofa holding a yellow ball, while a blurred person in a cream shirt sits smiling against a red brick wall behind it. [60-64] The scene cuts to a wooden bookshelf laden with messy books, some with red spines, then shows a rear view of a person in a cream shirt with shoulder epaulets standing near a dark shelving unit. [64-68] A white wireframe sketch of a geometric building appears over a faded aerial background, transitioning into a rough pencil sketch of the structure isolated on white. [68-72] The image dissolves into a minimal site plan with a square plot at a road intersection marked by red dashed lines; the text "WEST" is visible along the plot's edge near a compass rose.

[72-76] A translucent light green strip labeled "WEST" appears along the top edge as red dashed road lines vanish. [76-78] A blue strip labeled "EAST" materializes along the bottom boundary. [78-82] A yellow strip labeled "SOUTH" emerges horizontally in the middle, separating the zones. [82-84] The solid colored strips fade significantly while a grey rectangular volumetric shape materializes centrally. [84-86] The grey volume transitions into three colored prisms: a dark blue block in the foreground, a yellow block in the middle section, and a green block forming the rear. The compass rose persists in the lower left corner throughout.

[86-90] A stepped massing model comprising dark blue, yellow, and green rectangular blocks sits on a white plot. Two realistic green trees materialize on the left near the western road boundary; a compass rose remains fixed bottom-left.
[90-92] A large, translucent pale green rectangular volume materializes floating above the existing stepped blocks.
[92-94] The floating volume transforms into a solid, opaque building mass featuring yellow, green, and teal sections. White text "KITCHEN" becomes visible on the side of the lower teal block.
[94-96] White text "BEDROOM" fades in directly above "KITCHEN" on the upper teal section.
[96-98] The view remains static, showing the colored lower blocks beneath the taller teal and yellow volume with persistent text labels.
[98-100] A translucent glass box structure with a dark grey roof materializes over the foreground dark blue block area, while upper blocks and trees remain static.

[100-102] A translucent glass box with a dark grey roof sits over a foreground blue block, below upper teal and yellow volumes labeled "BEDROOM" and "KITCHEN". A single green tree stands left, and a compass rose is fixed bottom left. [102-104] Text "LIVING ROOM" and "OPEN" appears on the glass box panels. [104-106] Black silhouettes materialize: one on the left sidewalk, two inside the glass structure, and one on the right sidewalk. [106-108] The transparent walls transition from grey to solid light blue, with "LIVING ROOM" visible on the left panel. [108-110] "POOJA SPACE" text appears on the upper yellow volume. [110-114] A white rectangular outline forms on the foreground ground surface near the parking area, while the architectural model and figures remain static.

recent_thinks.text: The architectural visualization remains static, displaying the multi-colored volumetric model with labels like "LIVING ROOM" and "POOJA SPACE." Black human silhouettes stand on sidewalks and inside the glass structure. A white rectangular outline persists on the foreground ground surface near the parking area, while trees and the compass rose remain fixed.

A blue rectangular volume labeled "HOME OFFICE" materializes on the upper left building section. This new block sits atop the structure adjacent to the orange "POOJA SPACE" volume. The rest of the architectural model, including human silhouettes and trees, remains static.

The scene remains static with no new visual changes. The multi-colored architectural model retains all previous labels, including the blue "HOME OFFICE" volume on the upper left. Black silhouettes of people stand motionless on the sidewalks and within the glass structure. Trees and the compass rose remain fixed in their established positions.

[14-18] An exterior view through floor-to-ceiling glass reveals a room with a white rug, red chair, and sofa, anchored by a red brick column on the left. On the deck, black chairs surround a table with blue and green tops, framed by palm fronds. [18-22] Inside, a person in a cream short-sleeved shirt sits on a beige leather sofa against a red brick wall. A black dog lies beside them as the person holds and reads a newspaper. [22-24] A low-angle shot captures a modern chandelier featuring a

[218-226] A double-height living room features a perforated red brick wall, grey sofas, red bucket chairs, sheer curtains, a vertical painting, and a multi-bulb chandelier. The camera pulls back and tilts up, revealing a wooden wall with a TV and mezzanine railing. [226-230] A high-angle view shows the chandelier's branching structure over the sofas and a black arc floor lamp. [230-232] A close-up of the perforated brick wall and white column pulls back to show a wooden patio table and interior grey sofa with an ottoman, separated by a black door frame.

[232-238] The scene displays an interior living area where a grey sofa sits against a red brick wall. The backs of two red chairs with sculptural, perforated designs face the seating area. A black arc lamp extends over the sofa, and a wooden coffee table with a tray rests on a rug. Sheer white curtains drape along the right side.
[238-240] A wide shot reveals a double-height living room with a perforated red brick wall on the left, illuminated warmly. Grey sofas and red bucket chairs sit on a white rug near a wooden coffee table. Tall white curtains cover windows, and a complex chandelier hangs near a mezzanine railing.
[240-242] The view faces large glass doors opening onto a wooden deck where black chairs sit among lush green palm trees. Inside, a beige sofa rests against the right brick wall, facing a low wooden coffee table on a white rug.
[242-246] The shot cuts to an exterior view of the red brick wall featuring a perforated lattice pattern. Palm trees are visible on the left, and shadows highlight the texture of the masonry on the wooden deck floor.

[246-250] A static shot displays a red brick wall with a perforated lattice pattern, protruding blocks, and a wooden deck floor, transitioning to an extreme close-up of the masonry. [250-254] The view cuts to a wide exterior of a modern house featuring an elevated red brick volume on concrete columns with a white car parked underneath. A tall palm tree stands before the facade, while a grey concrete section above includes a balcony with black railings and hanging plants over glass windows. [254-260] A low-angle shot highlights the massive red brick wall and central palm tree, shifting to a high-angle perspective of the entire structure. This reveals a red brick lower volume supporting a cantilevered grey concrete upper level, surrounded by lush vegetation and neighboring white buildings.

[260-266] A high-angle shot captures a modern house with a perforated red brick lower volume and grey concrete upper level with a black railing, surrounded by palm trees. The camera pulls back to reveal a paved road curving past beige multi-story buildings on the right and a white house on the left. [266-272] As the drone ascends, a beige gate structure with "Gokuldham" text appears in the foreground while the scene darkens significantly. [272-274] The view fades to black, followed by a pale green square logo with "DWF" and "DESIGN WORK GROUP".
